_doc: Mocked public-safe BPMN operate migrate of a paused instance to a new version.

rules.match: maestro bpmn instance get inst-paused-005 -f folder-public
maestro bpmn instance get inst-paused-005 --folder-key folder-public
maestro bpmn instance migrate inst-paused-005 2.0.0 -f folder-public
maestro bpmn instance migrate inst-paused-005 2.0.0 --folder-key folder-public
